package.name: welding_recommendation_skill
package.description:
Mock implementation of the "request AI recommendation" skill. Lifecycle action server triggered by the REQUEST_AI_RECOMMENDATION intent (ROBIN dashboard "Ask for a new AI recommendation" button). Mock: 3 s with FETCHING → PROCESSING → COMPLETE phase feedback. Returns a stub JSON recommendation; in production replace with a call to the robin backend POST /ai-recommendation endpoint.
ros4hri compliance: conceptually implements ai_skills/RequestRecommendation.
